utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 appear. Check full specification: Each category includes the specified type and costs. Health coverage includes physical and mental health with costs and a total. Property coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs and a total. Travel coverage includes travel insurance with costs and a total. Additional services lists an enhancement service with costs and a total. Total budget provides monthly and annual cost breakdown. All required details are present.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each item name from the final coverage plan to the exact corresponding entry in the ground-truth ratings. For items that share the same product name across categories (e.g., InsurePlus Standard Plan), I used the specific category context (physical health, mental health, travel) to select the correct rating. For add-ons like Adventure Travel Coverage and Premium Medical Network, I mapped them to the travel_enhancement_services section.
